tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable

next

    edit "ssl.root"

        set vdom "root"

        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall addr
    edit "Allowed-HTTP"
        set subnet 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set service "PING" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
    next
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allowed-Web"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 102
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-HTTPS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
end"}

show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"

        set srcaddr "all"

    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allowed-Web"
        set uuid 7af715c4-2ac8-51f1-fa93-7c6088528f6e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"

        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"

next
